<?php namespace Hamcrest\Type; /* Copyright (c) 2010 hamcrest.org */ use Hamcrest\Core\IsTypeOf; /** * Tests whether the value is an object. */ class IsObject extends IsTypeOf { /** * Creates a new instance of IsObject */ public function __construct() { parent::__construct('object'); } /** * Is the value an object? * * @factory anObject */ public static function objectValue() { return new self; } }
